entries.name: HCULimit
entries.description: Tracks and enforces homomorphic computation unit limits for FHEVM operation requests.

entries.name: KMSVerifier
entries.description: Verifies KMS signatures over public decryption results before those results are accepted onchain.

entries.name: DAO
entries.description: Aragon DAO that stores governance state and executes proposal action batches.

directlyReceivedPermissions.description: change multisig plugin target execution configuration.
block and unblock users, transfer ownership, and authorize implementation upgrades.

$activePermissions.description: Active Aragon grants reconstructed from Granted and Revoked events. The permissionId, target contract (where), grantee (who), and optional condition are preserved.

multisigSettingsAdmins.description: Current multisig-settings grantees derived from Aragon grant/revoke events.

multisigTargetConfigAdmins.description: Current multisig target-configuration grantees derived from Aragon grant/revoke events.

publicProposalCreators.description: Multisig plugins with public proposal creation configured through Aragon grant/revoke events.

publicProposalExecutors.description: Multisig plugins with public proposal execution configured through Aragon grant/revoke events.

daoExecutors.description: Current DAO executor grantees derived from Aragon grant/revoke events.

daoRootHolders.description: Current DAO root grantees derived from Aragon grant/revoke events.

daoUpgraders.description: Current DAO implementation-upgrade grantees derived from Aragon grant/revoke events.

entries.name: PauserSet
entries.description: Maintains the pauser account set used in pause-control checks.

entries.name: ZamaGovMultisigB
entries.description: Aragon multisig plugin for creating proposals and collecting approvals against a configurable threshold.

receivedPermissions.description: change multisig plugin target execution configuration.
change multisig plugin target execution configuration.
block and unblock users, transfer ownership, and authorize implementation upgrades.

directlyReceivedPermissions.description: execute arbitrary DAO actions, including calls as wrapper owner and UUPS upgrades.

multisigSettings.description: Aragon multisig settings: whether proposal creation is restricted to listed members and the minimum approval threshold.

addresslistLength.description: Number of addresses currently listed as multisig members.

$members.description: Current multisig members reconstructed from MembersAdded and MembersRemoved events.

$threshold.description: Minimum approvals required by this multisig plugin.

entries.name: ACL
entries.description: Access-control registry for encrypted handles, storing handle allowances and delegation state for ciphertext references.

entries.name: InputVerifier
entries.description: Verifies signed encrypted input bundles before they are accepted as ciphertext handles.

values.EIP712_INPUT_VERIFICATION_TYPE: CiphertextVerification(bytes32[] ctHandles,address userAddress,address contractAddress,uint256 contractChainId,bytes extraData)

entries.name: FHEVMExecutor
entries.description: FHEVM executor that accepts encrypted operation requests, accounts for computation usage, and stores ciphertext handles for operation results.

entries.name: ZamaGovMultisigA
entries.description: Aragon multisig plugin for creating proposals and collecting approvals against a configurable threshold.

receivedPermissions.description: change multisig plugin target execution configuration.
change multisig plugin target execution configuration.
block and unblock users, transfer ownership, and authorize implementation upgrades.

directlyReceivedPermissions.description: execute arbitrary DAO actions, including calls as wrapper owner and UUPS upgrades.

multisigSettings.description: Aragon multisig settings: whether proposal creation is restricted to listed members and the minimum approval threshold.

addresslistLength.description: Number of addresses currently listed as multisig members.

$members.description: Current multisig members reconstructed from MembersAdded and MembersRemoved events.

$threshold.description: Minimum approvals required by this multisig plugin.

entries.name: ConfidentialUSDCWrapper
entries.description: ERC-20 wrapper that escrows an underlying token and issues confidential balances. It supports encrypted transfers, wrapping, unwrapping, local blocking, and underlying-token denylist checks.

values.contractURI: data:application/json;utf8,{"name":"Confidential USDC","symbol":"cUSDC","description":"Confidential wrapper of USDC shielding it into a confidential token"}
values.name: Confidential USDC

pendingOwner.description: Pending owner for a two-step ownership transfer.

underlying.description: ERC-20 token escrowed by this wrapper.

getUnderlyingDenyListSelector.description: Underlying-token denylist hook used by the wrapper. For cUSDC this is USDC's isBlacklisted(address) selector, so Circle blacklist status is enforced on wrapper operations.

blockedUsers.description: Wrapper-local denylist reconstructed from UserBlocked and UserUnblocked events.

fheAcl.description: Zama ACL contract used by the confidential token stack to check which accounts/contracts may use encrypted handles.

fheCoprocessor.description: Zama FHE coprocessor/executor contract that receives encrypted-operation requests and stores encrypted-result handles.

fheKmsVerifier.description: Zama KMS verifier contract used to verify threshold decryption/signature material returned by the offchain KMS.

underlyingBalance.description: Current amount of underlying USDC escrowed in the wrapper address.

isBlacklistedByUnderlying.description: Whether the underlying USDC token currently blacklists the wrapper escrow address.
